milestones.action: Review whether the player needs an Academic and Athletics Certification account before DI recruiting actions.
milestones.detail: The NCAA notes that DI recruits generally need the Academic and Athletics Certification account for recruiting, official visit, signing, or walk-on steps.
milestones.title: DI certification account planning

milestones.action: Check the current DI recruiting calendar before coach-facing outreach, camp visits, or visit planning.
milestones.detail: NCAA recruiting rules vary by division, sport, and grade level; DI uses sport-specific recruiting calendars.
milestones.title: DI contact calendar review

taskTemplates.nextAction: Review the current NCAA DI contact rule before coach-facing outreach.
taskTemplates.reasonDetail: DI schools are in the pipeline, so coach-facing outreach should be checked against current NCAA timing rules.
taskTemplates.title: Review DI coach contact timing before outreach

milestones.action: Review whether the player needs an Academic and Athletics Certification account before DII recruiting actions.
milestones.detail: The NCAA notes that DII recruits generally need the Academic and Athletics Certification account for recruiting, official visit, signing, or walk-on steps.
milestones.title: DII certification account planning

milestones.action: Check DII visit, tryout, and contact guidance before scheduling a camp or school visit.
milestones.detail: NCAA recruiting guidance varies by division and sport; DII uses division-specific reminders and rules.
milestones.title: DII visit and tryout rule review

taskTemplates.nextAction: Review DII visit and tryout rules before scheduling a camp or visit.
taskTemplates.reasonDetail: DII schools are in the pipeline, so visits and tryouts should be checked against current NCAA guidance.
taskTemplates.title: Review DII visit and tryout rules before scheduling

milestones.action: Create or review a Profile Page account while exploring divisions or planning a DIII path.
milestones.detail: The NCAA Eligibility Center lists the Profile Page account for students exploring options, DIII prospective student-athletes, younger students, or students unsure of division.
milestones.title: Eligibility Center Profile Page

milestones.action: Keep high-school course history organized so core-course and eligibility review is easier later.
milestones.detail: The NCAA Eligibility Center registration flow asks for education history beginning with year nine.
milestones.title: Education history from year nine

milestones.action: Shift more coach-facing follow-up to the student athlete while family supports logistics.
milestones.detail: NCAA recruiting guidance says parents and guardians often lead in grades 9-10, while students should lead more in grades 11-12.
milestones.title: Student-led outreach transition

milestones.action: Use the Eligibility Center Profile Page as the DIII planning record while school-specific admission and roster fit are reviewed.
milestones.detail: The NCAA lists domestic DIII prospective student-athletes as a Profile Page account use case.
milestones.title: DIII profile-page path

taskTemplates.nextAction: Review Eligibility Center account status, core courses, and graduation timeline.
taskTemplates.reasonDetail: NCAA-pathway schools are in the pipeline, so eligibility milestones should be tracked early.
taskTemplates.title: Check NCAA Eligibility Center account and core-course status
